creator: obrien@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #0)
Actually the package should be changed so that it doesn't over-ride FreeBSD's grep/egrep/fgrep.  I didn't install this package because I want GNU behavior, it is a dependency for debootstrap (Install Debian or Ubuntu base system into a directory).  I'd deinstall gnugrep if I could.
